body.title: Add config/profiles/research-orca.yaml — example research-agent profile
body.result: config/profiles/research-orca.yaml shipped: narrow research agent (inference+browser_use, shared channel, no mcp). Broker test verifies postgres excluded even when online. agent_datacenter commit 65aab73.
body.description:
Example research-orca profile YAML per § 4.3 of design. Demonstrates a non-igor agent type: inference + browser_use only, no postgres, no discord_bot, joins shared channel only, narrow ACL (inbound from skeleton + cc + igor; outbound to shared + cc). Validates that the broker handles profiles other than igor without hardcoded assumptions. Not on critical path of slice 2 green test — files alongside cc.yaml as parallel deferrable.

**Affected files:** /home/akien/dev/src/agent_datacenter/config/profiles/research-orca.yaml (NEW)
**Design rules:** matches igor.yaml shape; inherits: [] (slice 5 future); design § 4.3 example.
**Scope boundary:** in — single example YAML. Out — actual research-orca agent code (separate epic), inheritance.
**Test plan:** Extend tests with a research_orca fixture loading research-orca.yaml; assert allowed_devices == ['inference', 'browser_use'], default_channels == ['shared'], acl.inbound.allow == ['skeleton', 'cc', 'igor'].
